overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city (resembling Cyberpunk 2077's Night City). The player moves from a covered pedestrian walkway under an elevated highway, through commercial streets with neon signage, and arrives at a major intersection dominated by a large circular landmark structure with holographic displays. The environment features dense urban architecture, futuristic vehicles, and a vivid color palette with prominent greens and neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with green pedestrian walkway

events.description: large delivery truck passes by on the right side of the walkway
pedestrians in patterned clothing walk past the camera on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the green pedestrian path under the elevated highway, observing the urban surroundings

notable_agents.action: large black delivery truck driving along the adjacent road, passing from right to left

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass structure spanning the width of the street above
distinctive bright green painted pedestrian and bike lane with white markings
tall curved apartment building with green-tinted glass balconies
concrete wall covered in colorful street art and murals
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the highway pillar

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a massive elevated highway structure in a futuristic urban environment. The camera moves along a distinctive bright green pedestrian walkway, passing between a curved green residential tower on the left and a graffiti-covered wall on the right. A large delivery truck passes on the adjacent road, and pedestrians occasionally walk by.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with shops and steam vents

events.description: steam or smoke effects become visible rising from vents in the walkway ahead
passing by a yellow shop front with blue awning and red paper lanterns

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrower commercial street, passing by storefronts and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat standing near a shop entrance, facing away from camera

entered.detail: brightly colored commercial storefront with yellow and green paint scheme
futuristic digital advertising pillar with illuminated screen showing character art
ground-level vents emitting white steam or smoke across the walkway
traditional-style red paper lanterns hanging outside shop entrance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more enclosed commercial street lined with shops. The camera passes a yellow storefront with hanging red lanterns and blue awnings. Steam rises from ground vents creating atmospheric effects. An advertising kiosk stands on the right side of the path, and the elevated highway structure remains visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: street level with parked vehicles and moving traffic

events.description: transition from pedestrian walkway to street level, moving alongside vehicle traffic
futuristic yellow sports car with black hood drives past on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of the street, moving from the sidewalk onto the road level while observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: yellow futuristic sports car with black hood and neon accents driving slowly past the camera

entered.detail: wet asphalt road surface with yellow and white traffic markings
orange and gray multi-level parking structure with open concrete levels
futuristic yellow sports car with black hood, neon green underglow, and sticker-bombed side panels

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the covered walkway to street level, walking alongside the road. A distinctive yellow futuristic sports car with a black hood and neon accents drives past. The environment opens up with full sky visibility, revealing a multi-story parking structure on the right and various commercial storefronts. The elevated highway structure remains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with circular landmark building

events.description: arriving at large intersection with distinctive circular building featuring holographic displays
multiple futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection including a black sedan and white SUV

agents.ego_description: slowing down at the intersection to observe the traffic and the large circular landmark structure ahead

notable_agents.action: white futuristic SUV driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: massive cylindrical building with red structural elements and large holographic advertising displays rotating on top
broad pedestrian crosswalk with bold yellow parallel stripes
green metal railing separating pedestrian area from vehicle traffic
large rotating holographic advertisement projecting above the circular building

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide urban intersection dominated by a massive circular landmark building with rotating holographic displays on its roof. The camera approaches a yellow-striped crosswalk as various futuristic vehicles navigate the intersection. The elevated highway curves away to the left, and the scene features full exposure to the overcast sky with dense commercial towers surrounding the plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered depths of an elevated highway underpass into a sprawling, open-air cyberpunk intersection. It begins by moving along a bright green pedestrian walkway, passing between a curved residential tower and graffiti-covered walls as a delivery truck rumbles nearby. As the camera enters a more enclosed commercial street, the environment becomes atmospheric with steam rising from ground vents and red lanterns hanging from yellow storefronts. The scene then opens up to street level, where a yellow futuristic sports car speeds past and the overhead highway recedes to reveal a multi-story parking structure and the overcast sky. Finally, the path expands into a wide urban plaza dominated by a massive circular landmark building with rotating holographic displays, as the camera approaches a yellow-striped crosswalk surrounded by dense commercial towers.
